major_differences.parameter: Time Setpoint Not Met During Occupied Heating
major_differences.interpretation: The time during which the heating setpoint was not met decreased, indicating improved heating performance.

major_differences.parameter: Time Not Comfortable Based on Simple ASHRAE 55-2004
major_differences.interpretation: The time not comfortable based on ASHRAE standards decreased, suggesting enhanced thermal comfort in the modified scenario.

summary.overall_trend: The modifications resulted in a reduction of both cooling load and discomfort hours, indicating improved energy efficiency and thermal comfort.
